articles.description: The meeting, set for the afternoon of March 16, will be the third time Carney and the King have meet since Carney became prime minister a year ago.

articles.title: Tories slam Liberals for not disclosing strike on Kuwait military base
articles.description: Canada has an operational support hub at the Ali Al-salem Air Base, which also hosts the U.S. Air Force and was reportedly hit by an Iranian missile on March 1.

articles.description: Bell a favourite I have read and enjoyed the conservative Calgary Sun since its inception. I have always greatly appreciated the excellent articles over the years by Rick Bell. articles.title: Big-box stores could help slash emissions and save millions by putting solar panels on roofs. Why aren't more of them doing it?
articles.description: As the US attempts to wean itself off its heavy reliance on fossil fuels and shift to cleaner energy sources, many experts are eyeing a promising solution: your neighborhood big-box stores and shopping malls.

articles.title: Scientists just discovered a tiny signal that volcanoes send before they erupt
articles.description: A new detection method called “Jerk” could dramatically improve how scientists forecast volcanic eruptions. articles.title: Life rebounded shockingly fast after the asteroid that killed the dinosaurs
articles.description: The asteroid impact that wiped out the dinosaurs didn’t keep life down for long. New research shows that microscopic plankton began evolving into new species within just a few thousand years—and possibly in under 2,000 years—after the disaster.
